flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bacone College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.8k → $11.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bacone College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.8k → $11.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bacone College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.5k → $6.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 9 pp at Bacone College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.4% vs 11.3%).
